messages.buy_fails_object_does_not_exist: Terribly sorry, I don't have one of those, but I have a poem about one.  Would you like to hear it?
messages.buy_fails_player_cannot_afford_object: Sorry, you can't afford that, but you can afford a copy of 'Goethe: the poet's early years' (autographed version).
messages.buy_succeeds: That will cost you %d coins.  And with that fine purchase you recieve a free copy of 'Goethe: Mere Genius or God.'
messages.sell_fails_object_does_not_exist: Don't you know Goethe knows all?  Sell me something you have.
messages.sell_fails_shop_cannot_afford_object: I've spent all my money to feed all the hungry artists in the world.  I can't afford that.
messages.sell_fails_shop_does_not_buy_object: Get a clue!  Try the store next door.  Non-poets can't stand them.
messages.sell_succeeds: Money is but transient ether.  I will buy it for %d coins.

messages.buy_fails_object_does_not_exist: I beg your pardon sir, but I do not seem to have that right now.
messages.buy_fails_player_cannot_afford_object: I do not mean to be rude, but you cannot afford that item.
messages.buy_succeeds: Kind sir, that will be %d coins and thank you for your patronage.
messages.sell_fails_object_does_not_exist: I see no such item on your person kind sir.
messages.sell_fails_shop_cannot_afford_object: Sorry, but I do not seem to be in a position to buy that item.
messages.sell_fails_shop_does_not_buy_object: Sorry, sir, but I do not buy anything of that sort.
messages.sell_succeeds: Oh, thank you for the opportunity to buy from you.

messages.buy_fails_object_does_not_exist: I don't have that item...better try again sometime later.
messages.buy_fails_player_cannot_afford_object: Come back after you get a job to earn some money to buy that!
messages.sell_fails_object_does_not_exist: I might be old, but I'm not stupid.  You don't have that item.
messages.sell_fails_shop_cannot_afford_object: Sorry, but buying that item would put me over my budget.
messages.sell_fails_shop_does_not_buy_object: I have no interest in anything like that, go try somewhere else.
messages.sell_succeeds: Thank you for helping enlarge my collection, here are %d coins.

messages.buy_fails_object_does_not_exist: Oops, I forgot to order more, please don't tell Sam.
messages.buy_fails_player_cannot_afford_object: Sorry, but only Mr. Peterson's allowed to run up a tab anymore.
messages.sell_fails_object_does_not_exist: I might be from Indiana, but you can't put a cow in my lap!
messages.sell_fails_shop_cannot_afford_object: Everytime Sam goes on a date, he leaves me with no money to buy anything!
messages.sell_fails_shop_does_not_buy_object: HA HA, now why would I want something like that?
messages.sell_succeeds: Here are %d coins, wait until Sam hears about what I bought.

messages.buy_fails_object_does_not_exist: Sorry, but that item hasn't been unloaded from the trucks yet.
messages.buy_fails_player_cannot_afford_object: Look, I've got better things to do than talking to dead beats!
messages.buy_succeeds: That will be %d coins, thank you and come again!
messages.sell_fails_object_does_not_exist: Like, stop wasting my time with things you don't have!
messages.sell_fails_shop_cannot_afford_object: Sorry, the store's going through financial difficulties now.
messages.sell_fails_shop_does_not_buy_object: You can't return something that you can't buy here!
messages.sell_succeeds: Here is your %d coins for your item.

messages.buy_fails_object_does_not_exist: Sorry, I don't have that right now.
messages.buy_fails_player_cannot_afford_object: If you want that, you'd better come back with some money.
messages.sell_fails_object_does_not_exist: What the hell's wrong with you, boy...you blind?!
messages.sell_fails_shop_cannot_afford_object: Sorry, business is bad, so I can't buy that right now.
messages.sell_fails_shop_does_not_buy_object: This is a fish store...you can't expect me to buy that!

messages.buy_fails_object_does_not_exist: What are you, blind?  Can't you see I don't have that right now?!
messages.buy_fails_player_cannot_afford_object: Get out of here, you no good bum, come back when you get some money!
messages.buy_succeeds: Pssst, I'll let you have it for %d coins.
messages.sell_fails_object_does_not_exist: Do you think I'm blind!?  Get out of here, you con artist!
messages.sell_fails_shop_cannot_afford_object: Sorry, but all my money went into bailing me out of jail!

messages.buy_fails_object_does_not_exist: Yrros, ew era tuo fo taht thgir won.
messages.buy_fails_player_cannot_afford_object: Ouy dlouhs peek retteb kcart to ruoy yenom esuac' ruoy ekorb!
messages.sell_fails_object_does_not_exist: Ouy tog ot eb gniddik, ouy t'nod evah taht meti.
messages.sell_fails_shop_cannot_afford_object: I t'nod yub yna smeti, os ti t'nseod rettam taht m'I ekorb!
messages.sell_fails_shop_does_not_buy_object: Ew od ton yub gnihtyna tuohtiw tpiecer, hcihw ew t'nod evig.
messages.sell_succeeds: S'taht elbissopmi esuac' I t'nod yub gnihtyna.

messages.buy_fails_object_does_not_exist: I don't have that!  Try list!
messages.buy_fails_player_cannot_afford_object: Har!  No free rides here!  Come back when you have more money!
messages.buy_succeeds: That'll be %d coins, matie.  Happy sailing.
messages.sell_fails_object_does_not_exist: Show me one and I'll buy it!  You don't have one!
messages.sell_fails_shop_cannot_afford_object: That's such a fine vessel... too bad, I can't afford it.
messages.sell_fails_shop_does_not_buy_object: Sorry, that thing doesn't look like it floats too well!
messages.sell_succeeds: I'll give you %d coins for that fine craft.

messages.buy_fails_object_does_not_exist: Haven't got that on storage -- try list!
messages.sell_fails_object_does_not_exist: You don't seem to have that.
messages.sell_fails_shop_cannot_afford_object: That is too expensive for me - Try a wizard!
messages.sell_fails_shop_does_not_buy_object: I only buy armors.. Go away!

messages.buy_fails_object_does_not_exist: Sorry, I don't have that -- try list!
messages.buy_fails_player_cannot_afford_object: Friend, you don't seem to have enough money for that.
messages.sell_succeeds: Here, you can have %d coins for that.
